## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed (if applicable).

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?

Rippie relies heavily on external APIs. Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] I tested this locally by sending a Discord message with the following link: `[insert link]`
- [ ] The platform buttons generated correctly and lead to the exact same track.
- [ ] (If UI change) I have attached screenshots of the new Discord embed/buttons below.

## Checklist:

- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` document.
- [ ] I have read and followed `.gemini/best-practices.md`.
- [ ] I have run `bun run format` on my code.
- [ ] My code strictly types new data and avoids `any`.
- [ ] (If applicable) I have noted if AI was used to generate this PR.
